notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with proper wrapping, asteroid splitting, UFO with aimed shots, hyperspace, lives system, wave progression, and audio — minor issues include the ship drawing orientation (nose points up but angle math uses right-facing convention causing slight visual mismatch) and the UFO shape is simplified but functional.

A solid and fairly complete Asteroids clone with good classic presentation, but strict scoring is warranted because wrapping visuals are inconsistent for ship/UFO/bullets, title/game-over mutate state inside render, and some mechanics/control choices are slightly rough rather than arcade-polished.
